category_sources: source_facts.description says Ice is a comprehensive RPC framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is ZeroC, the official vendor for Ice; source_facts.name identifies the package as ice.
docs_sources: Official ZeroC documentation site provides the Ice documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an official repository URL, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an RPC framework; source_facts.executables includes Slice compilers and Ice service tools such as slice2cpp, icebox, and icegridadmin.
